---
title: "Decision 1 · Market Entry"
subtitle: "Which market segment should Sigmoid target first for the CRM?"
---

::: {.page-context}
::: {.pc-crumb}
Decisions <span class="sep">›</span> Market Entry
:::
::: {.pc-supports}
**This page supports:** which segment should Sigmoid target first for the CRM?
:::
::: {.pc-row}
<span class="chip chip-neutral no-dot">Register-driven · D1</span>
<span class="pc-next">[Open the Market Prioritisation dashboard](../dashboards/market-prioritisation.qmd)</span>
:::
:::

The decision record below reads live from `data/sample/decision_register.csv`; its claims read from
`data/sample/claim_register.csv`. Edit those files and re-render, and this page updates.

```{python}
#| label: decision-record
#| echo: false
import sys, pathlib
_root = pathlib.Path.cwd()
while _root != _root.parent and not (_root / "src").is_dir():
    _root = _root.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_root))
from IPython.display import HTML
from src.registers import render_decision_record, render_claim_cards
HTML(render_decision_record("D1"))
```

## Claims behind this decision

Each claim is a **hypothesis**. It advances toward grade B only when real discovery evidence meets the
bar shown — not before.

```{python}
#| label: claims
#| echo: false
HTML(render_claim_cards("D1"))
```

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}
**Go deeper.** Long-form reasoning, analysis plan, and limitations:
[Working Paper › Market Prioritisation](../working-paper/05-market-prioritisation.qmd). To move a
claim, add real evidence via the [Evidence Register](../evidence/evidence-register.qmd).
:::
